text.message: don't take deals with red please
how are black and I the problem?
just watch out before you make deals with him
This isnt my first game of catan
he thinks he is god of catan
just you wait for what I say to happen.
I won't say a word from now
Have you asked yourself whom you want with longest road?
But it aint gonna happen unfortunately
Thx for being such a believer
Remember when red was going to be unstoppable?
red had the most amount of wood and brick on the board
it's not on me if he went for army
and anyway, the 6s went off in this game
